reviews.review_text: Great day spent at the "Orange show" easy access for wheelchairs plenty of parking

We planned to stay a few night at Orange to have a look around. They said max stay 1 night!!  Spoke to lady at info centre who said …. Oh we might let you stay another night.  We were not going to set up somewhere to be told to move on next day.  We drove to Parkes. Camped there and spent hundred of dollars in their town. Did not even bother to look around Orange. Very disappointing.  They are doing themselves out of many touristdollars
Attended the Bird Expo there.

As "said Traveler I shall give my honest opinion from my experience, only caters for self contained caravans -No Tent sight no powered sight disappointed in the council & all that property,could benefit the poor & homeless but won't 😔👎👎👎👎👎
Great car show

Couldn’t check in with QR code ! Either could others who tried! So had to go into council information centre. ( Staff there were nice & helpful)
No toilets , water , electricity. & garage bin not near camping area.
1 night there was enough .  Never again .
Left Orange & went to Manildra show ground & for an extra $5 a day you get 5 star treatment. Cleanest showers & toilet , power & water . Excellent Camp kitchen , BBQ & laundry.
We extended our stay there & will be back again.
Poor signage  re rv stay so I left as it felt unwelcoming
nice
Hosts a large fenced in, off lead dog exercise area. Whilst there is no trees or shade within this area, the large nature of it leaves the doggos sufficiently tuckered afterwards

We came to the showground to camp. Surprised to see all toilets locked. Even being self sufficient we do appreciate toilets. I think it is very unhygienic considering there are campers with small vehicles & obviously no portable toilet with them. Otherwise the camping area is beautiful & very close to the town centre. Cheers Barbara
Awesome free stop over camp thanks to the Orange Council, well worth a stop

It’s functional and you can park where you like. It’s 100% free and you get what you pay for. We visited at the beginning of spring so it’s very cold out there. Our gas heating came in useful.
No access to any toilets and must be self contained. It’s great if you are passing through.

Nice and quiet.
But don't park near drain or on lower section if it rains you might get flooded.
So handy and safe! No access to toilets but that’s ok
Just th rotary meeting a few people there good food good coffee a few vendors selling goods 👍🏼
Free camping for the self contained. Thanks heaps Orange. 👍✅

Most sites a
big suit most vans.
Camped here and found it fine. Was a shame the 2 toilet blocks were locked, but it was for free, so all things considered, you get what you pay for
Dogs heaven and looks so lovely in autumn
Great place to stay but the female toilets where locked.
Beautiful grounds we stayed a few nights  and also attended the Moscow circus there . Loved the grounds well kept Thank you for your hospitality Orange xx
No toilets open
Great range of delicious food and things at the farmers markets on a Saturday morning. Music was amazing!
Great free camp.toilets.lots of grass area.
Beaut spot for overnight...
We stayed 1 night during our roadtrip. It's a free campsite. It's Ok to spend the night. The toilets are closed.

Masters League Crossfit Final 2024
Great venue
Great showgrounds plenty of room.  Would be better if toilets were open.  Worth going out Borenore Caves for walk -3 caves

Our stay was a free camp,  close to the Orange town centre.  Clean and lots of level places to put your van
As long as you're self-contained.  You book at the Tourist centre.
Amenities are great aswell as bar-b-q area with fridges.
great free accommodation for the night for self contained only. Sites are moderately flat, tilt to the showground.
If they didn't lock the  toilets
Excellent stop thank you Orange Council
Good show, but it is a little expensive at $20 adult entry.
Great facilities
Free Campground.....but toilets are locked
Free overnight stay but no toilets, must be self contained, no power and not allowed to use the water,

Campers beware,
There's a Dodgy fella that rides around on a kids motorbike casing the place out
New building has great amenities
Quiet, good facilities and hot showers. Reception staff were helpful. Convenient to Orange CBD.
Organic markets. Good facilities, produce and locals.
Its good
Great free camp for self contained caravans/motorhomes.
We went to the growers market, which was really good
